function executeOpenPosition(address x2swap, uint256 assetAmount, uint256 maxDeviationBps, address exchangeAddress, bytes calldata path, uint256 deadline) external returns (uint256)
function executeClosePosition(address x2swap, uint256 positionId, uint256 maxDeviationBps, address exchangeAddress, bytes calldata path, uint256 deadline) external
event PositionOpened(uint256 indexed positionId, uint256 amount, uint256 timestamp)
event PositionClosed(uint256 indexed positionId, uint256 timestamp)
event Deposited(address indexed owner, uint256 amount)
event Withdrawn(address indexed owner, uint256 amount)
event AgentUpdated(address indexed oldAgent, address indexed newAgent)
event LimitsUpdated(uint256 maxPerTrade, uint256 maxTotalExposure, uint256 timeWindow)
